sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44762" key="eu)peri/yogos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐπερί-ψογος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n44762.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">open to blame</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">διὰ γυναῖκα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
